summary: Both REQ-1 (RegisterPage Step 2 fix) and REQ-2 (LoginPage fix) appear to be implemented in the diff. LoginPage.tsx replaces the AuthMethodButtons component with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button that calls iiLogin() directly. RegisterPage.tsx resets authLoading and globalError on entering the 'authenticate' step via a useEffect, and uses iiLogin() directly. All major acceptance criteria appear satisfied based on the visible code.
